topic: Cell A cobot protective stop, fault C4

messages.text: cobot in cell A just protective-stopped mid cycle, teach pendant is showing fault C4
C4 is a communication fault between the controller and the robot arm. usually the base-flange cable. check it's seated at both the base flange and the control box
found it, the base flange connector was slightly loose. reseated it
good. now restart polyscope / power-cycle the controller and clear the protective stop per SOP-2201, then re-home before resuming
restarted, cleared the stop, re-homed, running again. thanks lena
